gross_profit_margin.interpretation: Measures company's production efficiency. Higher is better.
gross_profit_margin.what_it_means: Shows percentage of revenue retained after cost of goods sold

operating_profit_margin.interpretation: Measures operational efficiency before interest and taxes.
operating_profit_margin.what_it_means: Indicates how much operating income is generated per rupee of sales

net_profit_margin.interpretation: Ultimate efficiency measure - shows bottom-line profitability.
net_profit_margin.what_it_means: What percentage of revenue becomes actual profit

roe.what_it_means: How efficiently the company uses shareholder capital to generate profits

roa.interpretation: Measures how efficiently assets are used to generate profit.
roa.what_it_means: How much profit is generated from each rupee of assets

current_ratio.interpretation: Measures short-term financial health and ability to pay obligations.
current_ratio.what_it_means: Company has ₹1.5-2 in current assets for every rupee of current liabilities

quick_ratio.interpretation: More conservative than current ratio - excludes inventory.
quick_ratio.what_it_means: Most liquid assets available to meet immediate obligations

cash_ratio.what_it_means: Percentage of current liabilities directly coverable by cash

working_capital.interpretation: Absolute measure of short-term financial cushion.
working_capital.what_it_means: Available capital for daily operations after meeting immediate obligations

debt_to_equity.interpretation: Measures financial leverage - proportion of debt vs equity.
debt_to_equity.what_it_means: For every rupee of equity, company has rupees of debt
debt_to_equity.concern: Higher ratios indicate higher financial risk

debt_to_assets.interpretation: Shows what percentage of assets are financed by debt.
debt_to_assets.what_it_means: Higher ratio means more assets financed by borrowing

equity_multiplier.interpretation: How much assets are supported by each rupee of equity.
equity_multiplier.what_it_means: Leverage effect of using debt financing

interest_coverage.interpretation: Ability to pay interest on debt from operating income.
interest_coverage.red_flag: Below 1.5 indicates difficulty meeting interest payments

asset_turnover.what_it_means: Revenue generated per rupee of assets

inventory_turnover.formula: Cost of Goods Sold / Average Inventory
inventory_turnover.interpretation: How quickly inventory is sold and replaced.
inventory_turnover.benchmark: Higher is better, depends on industry
inventory_turnover.what_it_means: Number of times inventory is sold and replenished during period

receivables_turnover.interpretation: How quickly receivables are converted to cash.
receivables_turnover.what_it_means: Times per year receivables are collected

dso.interpretation: Average days to collect payment from customers.
dso.what_it_means: How many days credit is extended to customers on average

health_assessment.excellent: All ratios in healthy range, consistent trend
health_assessment.critical: Multiple severe issues, urgent action needed
